title: Align v0.5.3 release and govern configuration adoption

riskAssessment.reason: Release selection, governance ownership, and generated status are user-facing trust boundaries.

executionDecision.reason: The remote tag, stale status, and configuration ownership gap are directly reproducible.

preReviewWarnings: Do not claim a configuration helper that is absent from public v0.5.3.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.json, install.sh, documentation, and public quality target describe v0.5.3 accurately.
Release distribution verification fails when the public pointer is not the highest remote semantic version tag.
Installation creates a configure_ai_cockpit Work Item before Project Profile, Guard, quality, or CI edits.
No-active status consistency rejects stale changed-file listings and ignores the generated status file itself.
Three README files use an explicit STACK variable with a language-neutral generic default and selection guidance.
Quality, real v0.5.3 distribution, lifecycle, and aggregate PR checks pass.
guidelines: Use only commands available in the selected public release.
Every configuration edit must be owned by the second adoption Work Item.
Generated status must be reproducible from current repository state.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly requested release, lifecycle, and adoption workflow corrections.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
